selection_rule: The deployed Elo architecture is selected by aggregate pre-holdout frozen-policy rolling out-of-sample log loss using a one-standard-error stability rule, preferring the simplest and most stable architecture inside the noise band; the MOV offset and cold-start warmup are profiled on the same OOS surface. March log loss with Brier tie-break is only a descriptive reference cross-check (the single-March split happens to agree) and is NOT the selector. Policy-matched nested rolling-origin evidence retains Elo-only over the blend. Period boundaries are derived from the data (nba_wp/periods.py); the dates above are descriptive for this season and are not consumed at runtime.
calibration: Blend fitted by penalized maximum likelihood (logistic stacking) on March component logits; no grid search.
